hero.description: Instantly verify FSSAI licenses for processed food. Simply check the 14-digit number on the back of the pack to confirm the manufacturer's details and safety compliance status.

verify.description: Verify food products by scanning the label or entering details manually. Our system validates FSSAI licenses, certifications, and manufacturer information.
verify.step_upload_desc: Take a clear photo of the product label
verify.step_verification_desc: Get instant trust score and status
verify.card_desc_scan: Upload a clear image of the product's back side showing FSSAI license, batch number, and other details. Ensure numbers are clearly visible.
verify.progress_failed: OCR failed. Please try with a clearer image.

results.genuine_msg: This food product has passed our FSSAI verification checks.
results.suspicious_msg: This food product requires further investigation.
results.fake_msg: This food product failed FSSAI verification. Do not purchase.

products.db_desc: Browse our database of verified and reviewed food products.
products.try_adjust: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

report.fill_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
report.success_desc: Thank you for helping protect consumers. An admin will review your report shortly.
report.thank_you: Thank you for helping us maintain food safety. Our admin team will review your report within 24-48 hours.
report.title: Report a Suspicious Food Product
report.desc: Help protect other consumers by reporting fake or suspicious food products.
report.details_desc: Please provide as much detail as possible to help us investigate.
report.ph_reason: Describe why you believe this food product is fake or suspicious...
report.ph_evidence: Any additional details, observations, or evidence...

footer.protecting: Protecting consumers through FSSAI-based food product authentication.
footer.copyright: © 2026 TrustVerify. This is an academic project using mock data for demonstration purposes.

dialog.reason_desc: Please provide a reason for reporting this product.
dialog.success_desc: Thank you for helping us maintain product authenticity. Our team will review your report.
dialog.failed_desc: Failed to submit report. Please try again later.
dialog.title: Report Suspicious Product
dialog.desc: Help protect other consumers by reporting fake or suspicious products. Our admin team will review your report.
dialog.ph_reason: Describe why you believe this product is fake or suspicious...
dialog.ph_evidence: Any additional details that might help our investigation...
